package rulecoverage

func PositiveBackgroundJobsRegisteredFromGinPackagesInsteadOfBootstrap() string {
    ruleID := "background_jobs_registered_from_gin_packages_instead_of_bootstrap"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Scheduler or worker registration hidden inside Gin transport packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
